mapper.select: SELECT code_group_id, group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tbl_code_group WHERE code_group_id = #{codeGroupId} AND use_yn = TRUE
SELECT code_group_id, group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tbl_code_group WHERE group_code = #{groupCode} AND use_yn = TRUE
SELECT code_group_id, group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tbl_code_group WHERE use_yn = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order, group_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_code_group (group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, TRUE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_code_group SET use_yn = FALSE, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE code_group_id = #{codeGroupId} AND use_yn = TRUE
